theme_and_concept.description: Professional Android-first mobile application (implemented as a responsive web app) for managing agricultural drying plants.
theme_and_concept.mode: Light mode by default with Dark mode support.

hierarchy.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-primary-900 dark:text-primary-50
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-gray-500

rules: No generic sans fonts for headings. Use Work Sans for an industrial yet accessible feel.
Use #2E7D32 as the primary anchor for CTAs and key highlights.
Use Accent Orange (#F57C00) for alerts, maintenance status, and secondary actions.
Avoid completely white (#FFFFFF) backgrounds for the main app body in light mode; use a soft gray (#F8FAFC) to make white cards pop.
For dark mode, avoid pure black (#000000). Use #121212 for background and #1E1E1E for elevated surfaces.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Solid Backgrounds with subtle borders. Do NOT use glassmorphism (feels too fragile/clinical for industrial ag).
visual_enhancers.border_radius: Rounded-2xl or Rounded-3xl (Material Design 3 uses 24px heavily) for cards and modals. Rounded-full for pills and floating action buttons.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft ambient shadows for light mode (`shadow-md` to `shadow-lg`). For dark mode, use 1px subtle borders (`border-white/10`) instead of shadows to create elevation.

layouts_and_grids.general: Mobile-first approach. Since this is an Android-first concept, optimize for single-column layouts, thumb-friendly tap targets (minimum 44px), and bottom navigation.
layouts_and_grids.dashboard: Bento-style grid or single-column stack on mobile. 2-column grid on tablets. Feature 8+ metric cards.
layouts_and_grids.machine_grid: 2x2 grid on mobile for the 4 machines to ensure they fit in one viewport without excessive scrolling.
layouts_and_grids.bottom_navigation: Fixed at the bottom. 5 tabs: Dashboard, Customers, New Entry, Machines, More. Use lucide icons. Must have clear active state using Primary Dark Green.

components.cards: Shadcn UI Cards, customized with `rounded-3xl` and `border-0` with `shadow-sm`.
components.forms: Multi-step form for New Drying Entry. Use Shadcn Inputs, Selects. Add clear validation.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (`rounded-full`) or highly rounded (`rounded-xl`). Primary buttons use Dark Green. Include active/press states (e.g., `active:scale-95`).
components.timeline: For Batch Tracking. Vertical line with nodes connecting statuses: Received -> Loaded -> Drying -> Completed -> Delivered.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs, customized to look like Material Design 3 segmented buttons.
components.toast: Use Sonner for toast notifications (success/error messages).

motion.transitions: Smooth Simple Professional. No bouncy or unnecessary animations.
motion.interactions: Hover states on all buttons/cards (e.g., `hover:bg-primary-700`). Tap states (`active:opacity-80`) for mobile feel.
motion.page_loads: Fade-in for pages and staggered slight upward translation for dashboard cards.

coffee_drying.description: Man raking coffee beans on drying mats. Use for hero or placeholder in New Entry.

cardamom.description: Cardamom seeds. Use for product category placeholder.

warehouse.description: Large empty industrial warehouse. Use for login screen background or machines tab header.

rules: Images should have a subtle dark overlay (bg-black/40) if text is placed on them.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA contrast guidelines. Text over images must have drop shadow or overlay.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="login-submit-button"`).
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all tappable elements (buttons, nav items) to accommodate field workers using mobile devices.

instructions_to_main_agent: Since the target is an Android-first mobile application but implemented via React.js/Tailwind, constrain the layout to behave like a PWA or mobile app.
Use a fixed Bottom Navigation bar for mobile viewports (Dashboard, Customers, New Entry, Machines, More).
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for the bottom nav or headers; ensure they have solid backgrounds (Material 3 style).
Use lucide-react for all Material-style icons.
Dashboard should have 8 metric cards. Ensure they use 'Progressive Disclosure' and do not clutter the screen.
The New Entry form must be a multi-step component.
Implement the 'Machine Grid' as a 2x2 layout on mobile with clear status indicators.
Implement Sonner for all user notifications.
Make sure `data-testid` is added to EVERY button, input, and interactive card.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Do not use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters in this app context, stick to solid colors.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., `transition: all`). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, i.e., do not add `.App { text-align: center; }`.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
